calibration_correction: The v1 gate was infeasible because level target regions occupy 0.2083 to 0.3385 of context while reference and global scope caps were 0.20 and 0.25. V2 aligns the positive-control skill and H0 verification cap at 0.35 and makes registry-declared parameter bindings executable contract requirements.

target_gate.behavior_flip_definition: baseline chooses identity and edited arm chooses a program with a changed normalized behavior signature

risk_gate.risk_case_policy: all level-shift genuine-event cases in m0-corpus/2

preauthorized_second_lever.trigger: reference skill is retrieved and an effect-distinct program is supplied, but the fast Agent still chooses identity
